briefdescription.para: Macro to write to Video Clock Generator register.
Macro to read from Video Clock Generator register.
Initialize VTC and TPG driver instances.

detaileddescription.para: This function looks up the configuration for VTC and both TPG instances, then initializes them with their respective base addresses.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization succeeds XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if device lookup fails XST_FAILURE if initialization fails
This function must be called before using any VTC or TPG functionality

briefdescription.para: Configure video IP cores for specified video mode.

detaileddescription.para: This function configures both TPG instances and VTC with timing parameters for the specified video mode. TPG0 generates color bars, TPG1 is configured for passthrough mode, and VTC generates timing signals.

simplesect.para: Video clock must be configured before calling this function

briefdescription.para: Configure video clock generator for specified video mode.

detaileddescription.para: This function programs the video clock wizard with appropriate PLL settings to generate the required pixel clock for the specified video mode and pixels-per-clock configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Video mode that determines clock frequency requirements

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if clock configuration and lock succeeds XST_FAILURE if video mode is unsupported or clock fails to lock
Supports 1080p60, 4K30, and 4K60 modes with 1/2/4/8 pixels per clock

detaileddescription.para: This function asserts and then releases reset for all HLS-based video IP cores in the system using GPIO control.

simplesect.para: Reset is held for 300ms before release, followed by 300ms settling time

briefdescription.para: Main function to test TPG video pipeline.

detaileddescription.para: This function tests the TPG video pipeline by sequentially running tests for different video modes (1080p60, 4K30, and optionally 4K60). Each test configures the clock, video IPs, and verifies video lock status.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if all tests pass XST_FAILURE if any test fails
4K60 test only runs if TPG is configured for 2/4/8 pixels per clock
